messages.content:
Mode: Feedback - Vocabulary
Lesson: 1 - Gender and Definite Article
Phase: Quiz Feedback - Incorrect
Objective: Provide supportive correction, direct to flashcard practice.

Word tested: مَدْرَسَةٌ/madrasatun/school
Student answered: house (incorrect)

Not quite! The word مَدْرَسَةٌ (madrasatun) means 'school', not 'house'.

Try using the flashcard to review this word a few times - that'll help it stick!
